overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The journey begins at an outdoor cafe, proceeds through narrow commercial alleys with neon signage, passes through a large interior courtyard of a multi-level parking structure, and exits toward a city street. The scene features bright midday sunlight contrasting with shadowed alleyways and cyberpunk architectural elements.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at an outdoor cafe seating area between tall buildings. A woman sits at a nearby table as the camera begins moving forward through a narrow service alley. Food vendor stalls line the left side while trash bins and building walls flank the right, with sunlight streaming between the structures ahead.

The narrow path continues between commercial structures with various signage.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow commercial alley with reduced sunlight. Storefronts including 'Wash n' Run' and 'El Guapo' line the left side while vending machines sit on the right. The path leads toward a large multi-level structure visible at the end of the alley.

Concrete benches and a central planter occupy the open space. A male NPC walks past the camera while the view reveals stacked crates and additional vending machines near a staircase on the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the courtyard into another narrow service alley lined with food vendor carts and a yellow dumpster. The path leads toward a bright street exit visible ahead, with sunlight streaming through the gateway between buildings. Various storefronts and signage line the final approach to the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded outdoor cafe through a series of narrow urban corridors that eventually open into a wide architectural courtyard. It begins by moving past a seated woman at a cafe and through a service alley lined with food stalls, before transitioning onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with a red safety railing under the glare of digital billboards. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts back into the shadows of a commercial alley featuring storefronts like Wash n' Run and El Guapo, leading directly toward a massive concrete complex. The path then expands into a large interior courtyard surrounded by multi-level parking structures with red balconies and central planters, where a male NPC passes by. Finally, the camera exits the open space through another service alley filled with vendor carts and a yellow dumpster, moving toward a bright gateway that opens onto a sunlit city street.
